page: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-64 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the n4a server family. This configuration features 64 dedicated virtual central processing units and 512.0 GB of system memory. The resource allocation provides a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU core.

This server type does not include local storage or bundled graphics processing units. All storage requirements must be met using external network-attached storage options. Additionally, the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external network configurations for public internet routing.

With its high memory-to-vCPU ratio, the instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for applications requiring large memory footprints without the overhead of local storage or GPU hardware. Suitable workloads include in-memory databases, large-scale data processing, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy caching layers.
description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-64 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the n4a family, configured with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM. This resource distribution yields a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU, positioning the instance for memory-intensive applications. The server does not include local storage or integrated graphics processing units, meaning all storage needs must be handled via network-attached volumes. Additionally, no complimentary public IPv4 addresses are provided with this instance. The high memory density makes this configuration qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require substantial memory capacity without the added cost of local NVMe drives or GPU accelerators. It is suitable for hosting in-memory databases, large-scale data analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-heavy caching layers.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-64 is an x86_64 server featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512 GB of RAM. It is designed for memory-intensive workloads without local storage or GPU requirements.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n4a-highmem-64 is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 512 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server configuration featuring sixty-four dedicated virtual cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of system memory.
bullet_points: 512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
No local storage or integrated GPU hardware included
Requires network-attached storage for data persistence
Designed for in-memory databases and large-scale data processing
